entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of agricultural production, identified as a key driver affecting rural poverty

entities.name: RURAL POVERTY
entities.description: The economic condition of deficiency in rural areas, influenced by productivity and household demographics

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having access to adequate nutrition, which is heavily influenced by the level of rural poverty

entities.name: BAGALKOT DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific geographic area in Karnataka where the primary data was collected

entities.name: KARNATAKA STATE
entities.description: The Indian state where the study was conducted

entities.name: RATIOS
entities.description: A statistical method used to process the primary data

entities.name: FREQUENCIES
entities.description: A statistical method used to process the primary data

entities.name: PERCENTAGES
entities.description: A statistical method used to process the primary data

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the inter-linkages between productivity, poverty, and security

entities.name: PROBIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to analyze the probability of outcomes related to rural poverty

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SIZE
entities.description: The total number of members in a farm household, which positively influences rural poverty

entities.name: NUMBER OF DEPENDENTS
entities.description: The count of non-earning members in a household, which positively influences rural poverty

entities.name: POVERTY ALLEVIATION PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Strategies designed to reduce poverty by enhancing agricultural productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE ASSETS
entities.description: Resources transferred to the poor to increase their agricultural productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL CREDIT
entities.description: Financial support provided to farmers, considered an important aspect of agricultural productivity

entities.name: FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Entities that provide the necessary agricultural credit to rural households

relationships.description: enhances through transfer to the poor
